channel.title: Home on Peter Gao
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Peter Gao

item.title: About Me
item.description: I am currently pursuing a PhD in Statistics at the University of Washington. I graduated from the University of Chicago in 2017 with an MS in Statistics and a BS in Mathematics and Statistics.

item.title: Teaching
item.description: at the University of Washington: Teaching Assistant, STAT 220 Principles of Statistical Reasoning (Spring 2018) Teaching Assistant, STAT 221 Statistical Concepts and Methods for the Social Sciences (Winter 2018) Teaching Assistant, STAT 221 Statistical Concepts and Methods for the Social Sciences (Fall 2017)
